code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  mut line_opt = io.read_line()
  while true
    match line_opt
    when None
      return Ok(())
    when Some(line)
      if string.contains(line, "=")
        let parts = string.split(line, "=")
        let key = match parts.get(0)
        when Some(k)
          k
        when None
          ""
        end
        if not string.is_empty(key)
          mut value = ""
          mut i = 1
          mut first = true
          while i < parts.len()
            let part = match parts.get(i)
            when Some(p)
              p
            when None
              ""
            end
            if first
              value = part
              first = false
            else
              value = "#{value}=#{part}"
            end
            i = i + 1
          end
          print("#{key}:#{value}")
        end
      end
    end
    line_opt = io.read_line()
  end
  Ok(())
end
